query:
ALTER TABLE swap_validations
DROP COLUMN is_valid_swap,
DROP COLUMN astm_match,
DROP COLUMN fire_rating_match,
DROP COLUMN ul_listing_match,
DROP COLUMN strength_adequate,
DROP COLUMN r_value_adequate,
DROP COLUMN stc_adequate,
DROP COLUMN warnings,
DROP COLUMN project_state,
DROP COLUMN project_city,
DROP COLUMN project_type,
ADD COLUMN project_id INT AFTER sustainable_material_id,
ADD COLUMN overall_score DECIMAL(5,2) NOT NULL AFTER validation_status,
ADD COLUMN showstopper_results JSON NOT NULL AFTER overall_score,
ADD COLUMN passed_checks INT NOT NULL AFTER showstopper_results,
ADD COLUMN failed_checks INT NOT NULL AFTER passed_checks,
ADD COLUMN skipped_checks INT NOT NULL AFTER failed_checks,
ADD COLUMN recommendation TEXT NOT NULL AFTER skipped_checks,
ADD COLUMN validated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL AFTER csi_form_generated_at,
ADD COLUMN expires_at TIMESTAMP AFTER validated_at;
